questions.question: Consider a set A and a set B. What is the smallest number of elements in the union of A and B, given that the smallest number of elements in A is 4 and in B is 5?
A process takes 8 hours to complete. If it takes 3 hours to complete 3/4 of the work, how many hours will it take to complete the remaining 1/4 of the work?
A discrete mathematical structure is said to be finite if it has a finite number of elements. What is an example of a discrete mathematical structure that is not finite?
questions.hint: Think about a set with an infinite number of elements
